title: The Ship Pushes Through Danger
description: On pages 12–15, the ship pushes through danger as the crew searches desperately for medical help as Nami’s fever worsens and the Grand Line’s dangers keep testing them.
scene: The Ship Pushes Through Danger. The crew searches desperately for medical help as Nami’s fever worsens and the Grand Line’s dangers keep testing them. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Nami.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I know this is for VIVI's sake and all, but you really shouldn't be pushing yourself too much...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I told you, I'm fine!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami, I think you Oughta-

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Just be quiet and turn the ship around already!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Jeez...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Just what could it be...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It seems a little different from a normal storm...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I have to,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Return as soon as possible...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I have a request to ask all of you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I know that it's not my place to make such demands since you've already let me on this boat and all...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: But with the emerging crisis in my country, I want to go there as soon as possible.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Not even a single moment can be spared anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's why,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I ask for this ship to head for Alabasta,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: At the fastest speed!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Of course! Just like we promised!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: ...Thus, we need to find an island with a doctor immediately.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: We have to see to it that Nami gets better as fast as possible,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And then head for Alabasta!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That'll be the only way this ship can sail at the fastest speed, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You bet!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Can't get any faster than that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You sure? Aren't you worried about the lives of a million alabastans, being a princess and all?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Exactly! That's why we need to get Nami to a doctor as quickly as possible.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Well said, Viv!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I've fallen for you all over again!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I like your guts...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm sorry for making you worry,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: But please don't overweight yourself, Nami...!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: sorry... VIVI... but I think...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'm really...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ahhh! What is that!?

summary: This part centers on the ship pushes through danger, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
